summary: The actual UI transitions from the main menu to the settings view as expected, but the after state is incomplete, missing several sections like Display Profile and UI Scale compared to the wireframe. The outer frame remains consistent.

correctStateChanges.evidence: Title present in before images, absent in after images
Brief text present in before, replaced in after

correctStateChanges.expectedBefore: Visible on the right with buttons
correctStateChanges.actualBefore: Visible on the right with buttons
correctStateChanges.evidence: Panel and buttons present in before, absent in after
Section appears in after images matching wireframe
Frame remains consistent across before and after images

incorrectStateChanges.expected: Visible in after state with resolution, window mode
incorrectStateChanges.whyIncorrect: The full Command Settings view should include Display Profile, but it is missing, resulting in incomplete transition

incorrectStateChanges.expected: Visible in after state with slider
incorrectStateChanges.whyIncorrect: Expected UI Scale controls are absent, indicating incomplete settings view

incorrectStateChanges.expected: Positioned below UI Scale with full controls
incorrectStateChanges.actual: Appears directly after empty space following Server Endpoint, partially matching but out of order due to missing sections
incorrectStateChanges.whyIncorrect: Position and context incorrect due to missing preceding sections

incorrectStateChanges.expected: Full settings content fitting without excessive empty space at 1536x832
incorrectStateChanges.actual: Large empty space between sections, suggesting missing content or layout issue
incorrectStateChanges.whyIncorrect: Layout does not match wireframe dimensions and content density

wireframeSuitability.why: The before and after wireframes accurately depict the expected states, including all required elements and transitions, allowing effective validation against the functional and technical requirements.
